implementation_notes: Pure DOM construction via document.createElement / createElementNS — zero innerHTML assignment to user data.
Heatmap is exactly 13 weeks x 7 days = 91 <rect> cells; last day of the 90-day slice placed at rightmost column at the day's weekday; positions before the slice's first day are zero-filled.
5-level intensity palette using GitHub's documented green ladder (#161b22, #0e4429, #006d32, #26a641, #39d353).
URL validation: href/src only accepted if URL parses to http(s) protocol.
Hex-color validation for primary_language_color (defensive against malformed API data).
container is cleared via removeChild loop before rendering so repeat lookups replace prior content (MCA.ui-shell.6).
test_strategy: Static source-grep + dom_selector counts via jsdom or regex (run by edge-case-testing static-checks.js). Runtime DOM assertions deferred to first-contact CV in a real browser.
